title: Wonderland Recoil
overview: In a dystopian future, it is possible to print customized drugs and psychedelics with any effect from your home computer. Alice is trapped in her depressive life and desperately seeking an escape. She finds a brand new psychedelic drug: Nirvana -- designed to distort your reality. Alice takes the drug and arrives in Wonderland as her alter ego, Ecila. What initially seems like a euphoric experience of happiness slowly turns into a nightmare, forcing Ecila to face her demons.
